## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run check` PASS
- [ ] `npm run build` PASS
- [ ] New/changed CSS · JS · HTML have block headers (`N of M`, Version `1.a`, Revised `YYMMDD HH:MM`)
- [ ] New books: hard front matter (`title`, `slug`); soft fields OK with fallbacks
- [ ] UI strings: EN updated; PT updated if user-visible
- [ ] Docs touched if behavior or paths changed
- [ ] No notes/Hypothesis data hacks (notes stay in Hypothes.is)
- [ ] Self-review: I read the full diff
